headline: Datadog (DDOG) Stock After 75% Annual Gain Is The Price Still Reasonable
summary: If you are wondering whether Datadog stock is priced for perfection or still has room based on fundamentals, the starting point is to understand how its current market value stacks up against different valuation checks. Datadog last closed at US$223.00, with the stock down 3.0% over the past week, up 5.1% over the past month, and showing returns of 66.7% year to date and 74.9% over the past year. The 3 year and 5 year returns are 138.1% and 110.3% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on...
